title: Beginner Module 8 Practice: Beginner End-to-End Scenario
description: Recall NovaTech Solutions from Module 8: a small 8(a) IT contractor with three active government contracts totaling approximately $1.8M in contract revenue for fiscal year 2024 (January 1 – December 31, 2024). The contracts include a CPFF task order with the Army, a T&M contract with DHS, and a CPFF contract with HHS.
